chunks.text: Technical Reports - Alexandre Bayen. Predicting Degradation of Fuel Cell Membrane Electrode Assemblies from Buses (EECS-2025-107) by Harsh Srivastav and Alexandre Bayen. On Planning and Control for Multi-Agent Robotic Systems (EECS-2024-239) by Fangyu Wu. On Training Robust Policies for Flow Smoothing (EECS-2020-197) by Kanaad Parvate.
chunks.question: What are the titles and authors of the first three technical reports?
chunks.answer: Fuel cell degradation, robotic systems, flow smoothing.

chunks.text: Arterial Traffic Flow Prediction: A Deep Learning Approach with Embedded Signal Phasing Information (EECS-2020-68) by Victor Chan, Qijian Gan and Alexandre Bayen. A Generative Model of Urban Activities from Cellular Data (EECS-2017-201) by Mogeng Yin, Madeleine Sheehan, Sidney Feygin, Jean-Francois Paiement, Alexei Pozdnoukhov and Alexandre Bayen.
chunks.question: Which reports involve traffic prediction and urban activity modeling?
chunks.answer: Traffic flow prediction and urban activities model.

chunks.text: Alternate Representations for Scalable Analysis and Control of Heterogeneous Time Series (EECS-2017-195) by Francois Belletti. Applied Estimation of Mobile Environments (EECS-2014-32) by Kevin Weekly.
chunks.question: What are the last two technical reports about?
chunks.answer: Time series analysis and mobile environment estimation.
